name: wxcode-admin-statute-legal
title: Statute Legal Admin
description: Refined light-mode law firm dashboard for case and matter management — practice-area sidebar, KPI tiles for active cases / billable hours / deadlines / realization rate, matters table with status pills, upcoming deadlines panel, matters-by-practice chart, and recent documents list. Burgundy-gold accent palette on warm white surfaces.

query.en: Build me a refined law firm admin dashboard for case and matter management — practice-area sidebar, 4 KPI tiles (active cases, billable hours MTD, deadlines this week, realization rate), matters table with status pills, upcoming deadlines panel, matters-by-practice chart, recent documents list. Burgundy and gold accents on warm white.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a refined law firm admin dashboard for case and matter management — practice-area sidebar, 4 KPI tiles (active cases, billable hours MTD, deadlines this week, realization rate), matters table with status pills, upcoming deadlines panel, matters-by-practice chart, recent documents list. Burgundy and gold accents on warm white.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
